summary: Albertsons active PagerDuty alerts since 2026-06-18 whose imported alert summaries say the export failure was sent to client.

Grouped Albertsons sent-to-client export failures since 2026-06-18 from active PagerDuty imports: 95 alerts across 95 unique audiences and 95 incidents. Imported matching alerts run from 2026-06-19T02:03:39-07:00 through 2026-06-22T10:49:57-07:00; no matching June 18 alerts were present in the imported active PagerDuty data.

findings: By day: 2026-06-19=26 audiences, 2026-06-20=22 audiences, 2026-06-21=17 audiences, 2026-06-22=30 audiences.
Selection rule: org_id=albertsons_6, created_at >= 2026-06-18T00:00:00-07:00, summary contains sent to client.

summary: Export preflight evaluated all 95 Albertsons sent-to-client alerts. 45 are healthy_closed, 48 are blocked, and 2 are monitoring; treating blocked plus monitoring as still active gives 50 active audiences.

Delegated evidence collection found the blocked Albertsons audiences are mostly real export failures, but the 36 missing_export_after_alert checks are likely preflight timing/matching artifacts: all 36 had an unhealthy same-audience Pizza row before the sent-to-client alert and no row after it. The 12 snapshotting_error_requires_review checks all failed before export batches were produced.

findings: Missing-export cohort: 31/36 latest prior Pizza rows are snapshotting_error/no_batches, 4/36 are snapshotting_finished/export_error, and 1/36 is snapshotting_error/export_finished. Main failure clusters include BigQuery expression type incompatibility (10), Quervice pre_snapshotting_check timeout (8), blank export_error (4), HTTP client error (3), unknown pre_snapshotting error (3), plus smaller/singleton failures.
Snapshotting-review cohort: 8/12 appear to be BigQuery query validation/type mismatch around IN UNNEST with NUMERIC vs ARRAY<STRING>; 4/12 appear to be Quervice 600s pre_snapshotting_check timeouts.

Likely next step: reclassify sent-to-client alerts against nearest prior same-day Pizza row, then split remediation paths for BigQuery type mismatch, Quervice timeout, export_error, and odd state audience 11299.
